name: netsurit-innovate-plugins
description: Netsurit Innovation Team plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: questionpad
plugins.description: Collects structured user feedback via an interactive browser UI with typed cards, opened via Playwright MCP

plugins.name: deep-inquiry
plugins.description: Hypothesis-driven adversarial investigation for any domain. Forms theories, tests them, gets adversarial LLM review via OpenRouter, and pivots based on evidence.

plugins.name: architecture
plugins.description: Opinionated architectural standard for building single-tenant business applications on Azure with Container Apps, Next.js, Fastify, PostgreSQL, and Bicep IaC
